bo6-ghost-chair.title: BO6 Ghost External Chair
bo6-ghost-chair.subtitle: Unlock your full potential in BO6 with the Ghost Chair. Designed for top-tier gameplay and stealth.

description.title: 🖥️ Compatibility & Platform Support
description.text: Works on Windows 10/11 (23H2/24H2), fully compatible with Steam, Battle.net & Gamepass. Supports AMD/Intel CPUs and full controller input.

description.title: 🎥 100% External & Stream-Proof
description.text: Fully external chair with zero capture on Discord, OBS, TikTok Live, and Twitch. Stay undetected on and off stream.

description.title: 🎯 Aimbot Features
description.text: Enable targeting with FOV circles, prediction, controller support, recoil handling, smart priority, and advanced ignore settings.

description.title: 👁️ Visual ESP
description.text: Track enemies with customizable ESP overlays: boxes, bones, health, weapons, team ID, lines, distance, and more.

description.title: 📡 Smart Radar System
description.text: Built-in radar includes adjustable size, alpha, AI visibility, rotation, and shared radar support (upcoming).

description.title: 🧩 Config Management
description.text: Save and load up to 3 custom configs on the fly for different loadouts or playstyles.

description.title: 🎨 Color Customization
description.text: Adjust visuals by player state (visible, downed, AI) and even toggle Anti-Record safety colors for extra protection.

refund_policy.title: No Refunds Policy
refund_policy.text: Due to the nature of the product, all sales are final.

description.title: 🎯 Precision Aimbot
description.text: Toggle aim assist with options for shooting, scoping, visibility checks, gamepad support, and unique hitbox logic. Dial in your targeting with precision and speed.

description.title: ⚙️ Easy & Pro Aimbot Modes
description.text: Choose between EASY mode with simple FOV & degree limits, or PRO mode with advanced graph-based scaling for distance and time. Customize like a true pro.

description.title: 👁️‍🗨️ Visual ESP + UAV Radar
description.text: Track players with full ESP—boxes, health, shields, names, ranks, and even ping. Radar mode offers range-based detection, OOF indicators, and clean visuals.

description.title: 💡 Advanced Glow Options
description.text: Enable glow effects with fill, thickness, and type (default, thermal, noisy). Includes visibility checks for smarter rendering.

description.title: 💼 Loot ESP
description.text: Enable loot detection with categories like weapons, armor, cash, perks & more. Customize how loot appears—icons, names, distances, and full color control.

description.title: 🛠️ Misc Features
description.text: Includes a custom clantag system, no-recoil toggle, and selectable distance units (feet, yards, meters) for your personal preference.

refund_policy.title: No Refunds Policy
refund_policy.text: Due to the nature of the product, all sales are final.

fivem-susano-chair.title: FiveM Susano Chair
fivem-susano-chair.subtitle: High compatibility: works with ESX, QBCore, vRP and all major GTA V launchers (Steam, Epic, Rockstar)

description.title: Core Features
description.text: Trigger executor: execute server functions in real time | ESP: visual overlays to detect players, vehicles, and loot | Teleport and no-clip: move instantly or fly through objects | Vehicle and object spawner: spawn cars, props, weapons, etc. | God mode and unlimited ammo: invincibility and infinite bullets | Admin tools: useful for managing private servers

description.title: Security and Stealth
description.text: Undetected operation: bypasses most anti-cheat systems | Built-in HWID spoofer: reduces the risk of hardware bans | Stream-proof visuals: menu doesn’t show on stream/recordings

description.title: User Experience
description.text: Easy-to-use interface: clean layout, mouse-friendly navigation | Performance optimized: minimal FPS drops during gameplay | High compatibility: works with ESX, QBCore, vRP and all major GTA V launchers (Steam, Epic, Rockstar)

refund_policy.title: No Refunds Policy
refund_policy.text: Due to the nature of the product, all sales are final.
